description_long: This object is a portable road barricade sign commonly used in urban environments to indicate road closures. The sign features a rectangular white board with bold black text reading 'ROAD CLOSED', bordered by alternating orange and white diagonal stripes for high visibility. The board is supported by two vertical metal poles capped with orange octagonal finials, and three horizontal slats reinforce the structure. The base consists of two wide, black, angled metal legs that provide stability and prevent tipping. The materials appear to be a combination of metal for the frame and legs, and a durable plastic or composite for the signboard. This type of sign is typically placed in the center of a lane or at the roadside to block vehicle access during construction or emergencies.
description: A portable 'ROAD CLOSED' barricade sign with orange and white stripes, supported by a sturdy black metal frame and wide angled legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the signboard and the depth of the black metal legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'ROAD CLOSED' text, orange and white striped board, and the full structure of the barricade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the sign's slimness and the crossbar support.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain white back of the signboard and the supporting frame without any text.
